positive: A stylized, minimalist woodland scene featuring silhouetted animals (deer, fox, rabbit) gathered beneath a massive, stylized full moon. The aesthetic should be highly graphic, featuring thick, clean linework and negative space. Color palette is restricted to deep indigo, matte black, and muted gold accents. Composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed to wrap around a chest area of clothing. Use high contrast and deep shadow work, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets Scandinavian folk art. Vector illustration quality, suitable for screen printing, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, logo, messy, dirty, out of frame, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise
